summary: Iteration 11: Tested new Document Backup feature. All 10 backend tests passed. Both endpoints (GET /api/backup/documents and POST /api/backup/documents/import) working correctly. Frontend UI verified - 'Dokumente sichern' section displays correctly on /backup page with export and import buttons.

test_credentials.note: Test users prefixed with test_iter11_ were cleaned up after tests

context_for_next_testing_agent: Document backup feature fully working. ZIP export contains only documents with valid file_path (some older documents may not have valid paths on disk). Import correctly skips existing documents.

documents_backup_export.notes: Downloads ZIP file with documents/[filename].pdf and manifest.json. Admin only. Returns 404 if no documents have valid file paths.

documents_backup_import.notes: Imports ZIP backup. Skips existing files. Validates ZIP format. Admin only.

frontend_documents_section.notes: New 'Dokumente sichern' section with export ZIP button and import file picker.

api_tests_performed.documents_export_admin_success: GET /api/backup/documents as admin returns 200 with ZIP file
api_tests_performed.documents_export_import_cycle: Export->Import cycle works, existing documents skipped

ui_tests_performed.backup_page_navigation: Backup link visible in sidebar for admin, page loads correctly
ui_tests_performed.backup_page_stats: Database statistics displayed (7 Artikel, 9 Kategorien, 13 Benutzer, 7 Dokumente)
ui_tests_performed.dokumente_sichern_section: 'Dokumente sichern' card visible with info box
ui_tests_performed.export_documents_button: 'Dokumente als ZIP herunterladen' button visible and enabled
ui_tests_performed.import_documents_input: Hidden file input for ZIP import present
ui_tests_performed.info_box_content: Info box shows: PDF-Dokumente and manifest.json items

notes: Some documents in DB have no valid file_path (older uploads where PDF was deleted). The export endpoint correctly handles this by only including documents with existing files on disk. Currently 1 document (test_upload.pdf) has a valid file path and is included in ZIP export.
